Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Atlanta, GA?

Our directory lists 1,126 lawyers and law firms in Atlanta, Georgia, 792 law firms and 334 solo attorneys, all in Fulton County.

Who is a top rated lawyer in Atlanta?

Hahnah Williams Attorney At Law, P.C. is one of the highest rated general practice lawyers in Atlanta, with 5.0 stars across 87 reviews.

What types of lawyers practice in Atlanta?

Atlanta has 531 general practice lawyers, 290 personal injury lawyers, 83 divorce & family lawyers, 68 criminal defense lawyers, 38 real estate lawyers, 33 bankruptcy lawyers.

Do Atlanta lawyers offer free consultations?

Many do. Use the Call or Website button on any listing to ask about a free consultation, fees, and availability before you hire.

Attorney advertising. Georgia Lawyer Directory is an independent directory, not a law firm or lawyer referral service, and does not provide legal advice or endorse any attorney. Listings marked Premium are paid placements; rankings reflect ratings and verified reviews and are not for sale. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome. Contacting an attorney through this site does not create an attorney client relationship.
